name: LEX Series
description: The LEX Series represents Achilles' timeless line of traditional inflatable tenders, combining a classic aesthetic with modern structural refinements. These boats feature a full sectional wood floor and an inflatable air keel for improved tracking and stability. Built with Achilles' premium CSM reinforced fabric and four-layer seam construction, the LEX series is designed to be a solid, reliable, and economical tender that handles collisions with docks and hulls through its protective teardrop rub strake. They are lightweight enough for easy handling while remaining durable enough for consistent professional or recreational use.
features: Fold-Down Locking Oar System with Aluminum Oars
Sleek Bow Design for increased interior space

construction.material: Achilles CSM Fabric / Wood Floorboards

variants.name: LEX-77
variants.description: The most compact model in the LEX series, ideal for two passengers and small davits.

variants.name: LEX-88
variants.description: A versatile 8'8" tender balancing portability with a 4-person capacity.

variants.name: LEX-96
variants.description: The largest variant in the LEX line, offering the most interior space and stability for a classic wood-floor tender.

name: LSR-E Series
description: The LSR-E series is the only line of inflatable tenders featuring a foldable aluminum floor system. This design provides the rigid, stable platform of a sport boat with the quick assembly and portability of a roll-up tender. Built with Achilles' signature CSM reinforced fabric and a four-layer seam construction, these boats include a high-volume inflatable air keel for precise tracking and responsive handling. The aluminum floorboards are non-skid, corrosion-resistant, and maintenance-free, making the LSR-E an ideal choice for boaters who need a rugged, heavy-duty floor that can be easily stowed.
features: Fold-Down Locking Oar System with Aluminum Oars
Square Bow Design for maximized interior space

construction.material: Achilles CSM Fabric / Aluminum Floorboards

variants.name: LSR-260E
variants.description: A compact 8'6" aluminum floor tender that balances portability with the stability of a rigid floor.

variants.name: LSR-290E
variants.description: A versatile 9'6" model offering increased interior volume and a higher weight capacity for gear and crew.

variants.name: LSR-310E
variants.description: The largest in the LSR line, providing a 10'2" stable platform rated for up to 10HP.

name: SPD-E Series
description: The SPD-E Series consists of classic sport boats designed for performance and versatility. These models feature a deep-V inflatable keel and a rugged, sectional aluminum floor system that provides a rigid platform for superior handling and stability at higher speeds. Built with Achilles' signature CSM fabric and four-layer seam construction, the SPD-E boats are engineered to handle larger outboards and more demanding coastal conditions while remaining portable enough to be broken down for storage.
features: Fold-Down Locking Oar System with Aluminum Oars

construction.material: Achilles CSM Fabric / Aluminum Floorboards

variants.name: SPD-290E
variants.description: A compact sport boat that offers the rigidity of an aluminum floor in a manageable 9'6" size.

variants.name: SPD-310E
variants.description: A 10'2" sport model providing a balance of speed and stability for crew and gear.

variants.name: SPD-330E
variants.description: The largest in the SPD-E line, offering a spacious interior and rated for a 20HP outboard.

name: LSI-E Series
description: The LSI-E Series represents the pinnacle of inflatable tender convenience, featuring Achilles' unique high-pressure AirFirm™ drop-stitch floors. These floors are reinforced with CSM to provide a rock-solid platform when inflated, yet they allow the boat to be rolled up instantly once deflated. The LSI-E models incorporate 'Performax' tubes with a staggered design that helps the boat plane faster and stay on plane at lower speeds. Combining the performance of a rigid floor with the lightest weight in the Achilles lineup, the LSI-E is the ultimate yacht tender for easy handling.
features: Performax Tube Design for faster planing
Fold-Down Locking Oar System with Aluminum Oars

construction.material: Achilles CSM Fabric / High-Pressure Air Floor

variants.name: LSI-230E
variants.description: The lightest and most compact air-floor model, perfect for solo boaters or small davits.

variants.name: LSI-260E
variants.description: An 8'6" tender that balances extreme portability with a stable, high-pressure floor.

variants.name: LSI-290E
variants.description: A popular mid-sized tender offering excellent tracking and interior volume.

variants.name: LSI-310E
variants.description: A 10'2" high-performance air-floor boat rated for 10HP.

variants.name: LSI-330E
variants.description: A spacious 5-person tender with enhanced buoyancy and horsepower capacity.

variants.name: LSI-360E
variants.description: The flagship LSI model, offering 11'10" of space and 25HP capability in a roll-up format.

name: LT Series
description: The LT Series is Achilles' most compact and lightweight line of inflatable dinghies, designed for maximum portability and ease of use. These models feature a simple roll-up design with a folding wood floor, making them ideal for small cruisers or as a quick-deploy ship-to-shore tender. Despite their small footprint, they are built to the same high standards as larger Achilles models, using premium CSM reinforced fabric and four-layer seam construction to ensure durability and air retention in harsh marine environments.
features: Fold-Down Locking Oar System with Aluminum Oars
Large Diameter Tubes for maximum buoyancy

construction.material: Achilles CSM Fabric / Folding Wood Floor

variants.name: LT-2
variants.description: The smallest Achilles tender, designed for two passengers and easy one-person handling.

variants.name: LT-4
variants.description: A slightly larger dinghy offering increased stability and a higher capacity for 3 passengers.

name: LS-RU Series
description: The LS-RU (Roll-Up) series is engineered for the ultimate in convenience and storage efficiency. These dinghies feature a slatted wood floor that allows the boat to be rolled up instantly without removing the floorboards. This makes them perfect for boaters with limited storage space who still need a rugged Hypalon tender. The LS-RU combines the ease of a roll-up with a fixed transom, allowing for the use of small outboards while maintaining a very low weight profile for easy lifting and transport.
features: Fold-Down Locking Oar System with Aluminum Oars

construction.material: Achilles CSM Fabric / Wood Slatted Floor

variants.name: LS-2RU
variants.description: Ultra-portable slatted floor model, perfect for quick trips from boat to beach.

variants.name: LS-4RU
variants.description: The 8'6" roll-up variant offering increased passenger room and enhanced buoyancy.

name: HB-AL Series
description: The HB-AL series features a lightweight, single-deck aluminum hull that combines the durability of a rigid bottom with the portability of a lighter boat. These RIBs are chromated and powder-coated to ensure maximum corrosion resistance. Designed with a modified V-hull, they provide excellent tracking and a stable ride. The single-hull design keeps the weight to a minimum, making them easy to trail, launch, and lift with a davit system while remaining tough enough to handle rocky shorelines and frequent beaching.
features: Fold-Down Locking Oar System with Aluminum Oars
Bow Carry Handle and Interior Bow Lifting D-Ring

construction.material: Aluminum Hull / Achilles CSM Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: HB-240AL
variants.description: The most compact aluminum RIB in the line, perfect for small yacht davits.

variants.name: HB-270AL
variants.description: A versatile 8'10" model that balances interior volume with lightweight handling.

variants.name: HB-310AL
variants.description: The largest in the AL series, providing a stable 10'2" platform for up to 4 passengers.

name: HB-AX Series
description: The HB-AX series takes Achilles aluminum RIBs to the next level by adding a full-length flat double deck and an integrated bow locker. The double-deck design provides a flat walking surface and allows for the bilge to stay dry, while the spacious bow locker is large enough to house a 6-gallon fuel tank. This series offers the ruggedness of a powder-coated aluminum hull with the added comfort and storage typically found in heavier fiberglass tenders, making it the ultimate lightweight utility RIB.
features: Flat Double Deck for comfortable footing

construction.material: Aluminum Hull / Achilles CSM Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: HB-270AX
variants.description: An 8'10" deluxe aluminum RIB with a flat floor and bow storage.

variants.name: HB-310AX
variants.description: The flagship deluxe aluminum model, providing 10'2" of stable, flat-deck space.

name: HB-FX Series
description: The HB-FX series features a unique folding transom design that allows the rigid fiberglass hull to be stored in a much flatter profile than traditional RIBs. This innovation combines the superior tracking and performance of a rigid V-hull with the storage convenience of a much more compact boat. Constructed with Achilles CSM reinforced fabric and a hand-laid fiberglass hull, these boats are ideal for cruisers with limited deck or cabin space who still want the uncompromised handling of a rigid-hull inflatable.
features: Fold-Down Locking Oar System with Aluminum Oars

construction.material: Fiberglass Hull / Achilles CSM Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: HB-240FX
variants.description: An ultra-compact folding transom RIB, perfect for small cruisers and single-handed operation.

variants.name: HB-310FX
variants.description: A 10'2" folding transom model that offers significant interior volume while maintaining a low-profile storage footprint.

name: HB-LX Series
description: The HB-LX series offers a classic, lightweight fiberglass rigid hull design that provides a smooth, stable, and dry ride. These single-deck RIBs feature a deep-V hull design that cuts through chop more effectively than flat-bottomed inflatables. Their lightweight construction makes them an excellent choice for davit systems on smaller yachts, while the large tube diameters provide exceptional buoyancy and stability for passenger transport. Every HB-LX is built with Achilles' premium CSM fabric to ensure long-term durability in high-UV environments.
features: Fold-Down Locking Oar System with Aluminum Oars

construction.material: Fiberglass Hull / Achilles CSM Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: HB-240LX
variants.description: A lightweight 7'11" fiberglass RIB that is easy to maneuver and lift.

variants.name: HB-270LX
variants.description: The popular 8'10" model balancing weight and passenger carrying capacity.

variants.name: HB-310LX
variants.description: The largest in the LX line, providing 10'2" of stability and rated for a 15HP outboard.

name: HB-DX Series
description: The HB-DX series represents the premium tier of Achilles' fiberglass RIBs, designed for boaters seeking a step above the standard tender. These models feature a deep-V fiberglass hull for superior open-water performance and a built-in bow locker that serves as both a dry storage area and a comfortable seat. Distinguished by sleek, Euro-style tubes and high-quality finishes, the DX series is also compatible with optional seat and console kits, allowing owners to transform these open RIBs into fully equipped deluxe console boats.
features: Double Heavy-Duty Full-Length Teardrop Rubbing Strake
Optional Seat and Console Kits (Deluxe or Basic)
Fold-Down Locking Oar System with Aluminum Oars

construction.material: Fiberglass Hull / Achilles CSM Hypalon Tubes

variants.name: HB-280DX
variants.description: The most compact deluxe fiberglass RIB, ideal for 4 passengers and 15HP outboards.

variants.name: HB-315DX
variants.description: A versatile 10'4" model balancing performance and deck space; compatible with console kits.

variants.name: HB-350DX
variants.description: An 11'6" deluxe tender offering significant payload and 30HP long-shaft capability.

variants.name: HB-385DX
variants.description: The flagship DX model, providing 12'8" of length and rated for 40HP; includes wooden rowing seat.

name: FRB Series (Fast Rescue Boat)
description: Designed originally for fire departments and rapid response rescue units, the FRB (Fast Rescue Boat) series is a versatile utility boat built for speed and durability. It features a unique aluminum roll-up floor with an innovative hinge system and non-skid panels, allowing for set-up in minutes. These boats are equipped with over-pressure relief valves for safety and can be inflated via compressed air bottles. The deep-V inflatable keel ensures precise tracking, while specialized abrasion patches and rescue-focused hardware make it a practical alternative for a variety of professional on-water jobs.
features: Aluminum Roll-Up Floor with Non-Skid Panels
Full-Length Splash Guard with Life Lines

construction.material: Achilles CSM Fabric / Aluminum Roll-up Floor

variants.name: FRB-104
variants.description: A 10'4" rapid response boat with 4 carry handles and 2 over-pressure relief valves.

variants.name: FRB-124
variants.description: A 12'4" rescue model featuring 6 carry handles, 4 over-pressure relief valves, and heavy-duty bailer sleeve.

name: SGX Series
type_display: Aluminum & Wood Floor Sport Utility Boat
description: The SGX Series is a rugged line of sport utility boats designed for high-performance and heavy-duty use. These boats feature a deep 'V' inflatable keel and large tube diameters, making them ideal as dive boats, utility craft, or performance runabouts. The flooring system utilizes a mix of aluminum and wood floorboards with an aluminum stringer system for maximum rigidity. Built with Achilles CSM fabric and four-layer seam construction, the SGX is designed to handle demanding on-water tasks while providing a stable and dry ride.
features: Aluminum and Wood Floorboards with Aluminum Stringer System
Fold-Down Locking Oar System with Aluminum Oars
Removable Wood Seat with Dual Position Patches

construction.material: Achilles CSM Fabric / Aluminum & Wood Floorboards

variants.name: SGX-122
variants.description: A 12'2" sport utility model with a 1,520 lb load capacity, ideal for diving and heavy-duty tender use.

variants.name: SGX-132
variants.description: A larger 13'2" variant offering increased payload and rated for a 40HP long-shaft outboard.

name: SG Series
type_display: Top-of-the-Line Aluminum & Fiberglass Floor Sport Boat
description: The SG Series is Achilles' premier sport boat line, recognized for its iconic square bow configuration that maximizes interior space for gear and personnel. These boats utilize a high-rigidity aluminum and fiberglass floorboard system (aluminum and wood on the SG-124) with an aluminum stringer system for uncompromised structural integrity. Frequently used by fire departments and first responders for rescue operations, the SG series balances professional-grade durability with the performance required for fishing and diving. The newer SG-140SV model introduces an internal intercommunicating valve system for rapid inflation.
features: Square Bow Configuration for extra gear space
Aluminum and Fiberglass Floorboards (Aluminum/Wood on SG-124)
Fiberglass Encased Transom with Motor Clamp Plate

construction.material: Achilles CSM Fabric / Aluminum & Fiberglass Floorboards

variants.name: SG-124
variants.description: A 12'4" sport boat featuring aluminum and wood floors, popular for diving and fishing.

variants.name: SG-140
variants.description: The benchmark 14'0" inflatable sport boat, rated for a 50HP long-shaft outboard.

variants.name: SG-140SV
variants.description: Special variant of the SG-140 with internal intercommunicating valves and over-pressure relief valves for rapid deployment.

variants.name: SG-156
variants.description: The largest SG model at 15'6", featuring a 5-chamber design and a 2,800 lb load capacity.

name: SU Series (Sport Utility)
description: The SU Series represents the most rugged workhorses in the Achilles lineup, engineered specifically for heavy-duty commercial, military, and rescue applications. These boats are distinguished by their classic 'pointed bow' design and an exceptionally rigid recessed floor system. The flooring consists of high-density marine-grade wood and aluminum floorboards supported by a heavy-duty aluminum stringer system. Built with an extra-thick Achilles CSM fabric and reinforced with additional wear patches, the SU series is designed to carry massive payloads and handle the most extreme water conditions.
features: Pointed Bow Design for breaking through rough surf
Heavy-Duty Solid Brass or Stainless Steel Hardware
Five to Six Independent Air Chambers
Fiberglass Encased Transom with Heavy-Duty Motor Plate
Double Heavy-Duty Full-Length Teardrop Rubbing Strake

construction.material: Heavy-Duty Achilles CSM / Wood & Aluminum Floor

variants.name: SU-14
variants.description: A 14' heavy-duty utility boat with a 5-chamber design and 2,160 lb load capacity.

variants.name: SU-16
variants.description: The 16' model offering a massive 2,820 lb capacity and 6-chamber safety system.

variants.name: SU-18
variants.description: The flagship of the SU line at 18', designed for large crews and heavy equipment transport.

name: KSB Series (Kayaks)
description: The KSB Series consists of high-performance inflatable kayaks built to handle everything from calm coastal touring to moderate whitewater. Unlike standard recreational inflatables, the KSB is constructed from Achilles' professional-grade CSM fabric, making it significantly more resistant to punctures, UV damage, and abrasion. These kayaks feature a self-bailing floor system and a rigid I-beam floor construction that provides a stable, efficient paddling platform. They are designed for quick inflation and compact transport, fitting easily into most car trunks.
features: Multiple Independent Air Chambers for safety
Includes Carry Bag and Maintenance Kit

construction.material: Achilles CSM Fabric

variants.name: KSB-9 (Solo)
variants.description: A compact 9'2" solo kayak optimized for maneuverability and light weight.

variants.name: KSB-14 (Tandem)
variants.description: A 13'8" tandem model designed for two paddlers with extra room for gear.

name: RV Series (River Rafts)
description: The RV Series is Achilles' premier line of non-bailing whitewater rafts, built to withstand the most punishing river environments. Constructed with heavy-duty Achilles CSM fabric, these rafts are favored by commercial outfitters and serious private boaters for their exceptional abrasion resistance and longevity. The design features a large tube diameter for maximum buoyancy and a high-rocker bow/stern profile to climb over waves. The non-bailing 'bucket boat' design offers a traditional rafting experience with a lower center of gravity and a significantly lighter weight than self-bailing alternatives.
features: Multiple Stainless Steel D-Rings for Frame Securement
Reinforced Bottom Wrap for extra protection

construction.material: Heavy-Duty Achilles CSM / Traditional Floor

variants.name: RV-120
variants.description: A nimble 12' raft perfect for technical R2 paddle teams or small gear frames.

variants.name: RV-140
variants.description: The industry-standard 14' workhorse, balancing capacity and maneuverability for commercial trips.

variants.name: RV-160
variants.description: A high-volume 16' expedition raft designed for multi-day gear hauls and large paddle crews.

name: RV-SB Series (Self-Bailer)
description: The RV-SB Series combines the legendary durability of Achilles CSM fabric with a high-performance self-bailing floor system. Designed for high-volume whitewater and technical descents, the 'SB' floor features a laced-in, inflatable I-beam design that allows water to drain instantly through the floor-to-tube gap. This keeps the raft light and responsive even in the heaviest rapids. These rafts are built with extra-reinforced side wraps and a plethora of D-rings, making them the ultimate platform for both commercial paddle trips and heavy expedition rowing frames.
features: Laced-In Floor Design for rapid drainage

construction.material: Heavy-Duty Achilles CSM / Inflatable I-Beam Floor

variants.name: RV-130SB
variants.description: A 13' performance self-bailer optimized for technical whitewater and paddle crews.

variants.name: RV-140SB
variants.description: The premier 14' self-bailing raft, favored for its versatility as a paddle boat or rowing rig.

variants.name: RV-160SB
variants.description: A massive 16' self-bailer built for high-water expeditions and extreme payloads.

name: RV-SB-3T Series
description: The RV-SB-3T (Triple Thwart) series is a specialized evolution of Achilles' self-bailing river rafts, optimized for larger paddle crews and commercial whitewater applications. By including three reinforced thwarts as standard, these rafts provide superior structural rigidity and more secure seating positions for six to eight paddlers plus a guide. Featuring the same rugged Achilles CSM fabric and laced-in inflatable I-beam floor as the standard SB series, the 3T models are designed to drain water instantly while providing a stable, high-performance platform for the most challenging rapids.
features: Three Laced-In Thwarts for enhanced rigidity and seating
Internal Baffles for air chamber integrity

construction.material: Heavy-Duty Achilles CSM / Inflatable I-Beam Floor

variants.name: RV-130SB-3T
variants.description: A 13' performance raft with triple thwarts, ideal for technical paddle crews.

variants.name: RV-140SB-3T
variants.description: The 14' triple-thwart workhorse, offering maximum stability and crew support for commercial whitewater.

name: FR Series (Fishing Rafts)
description: The FR Series is specifically engineered for river anglers and expedition rowers who require a stable, high-buoyancy platform. Designed with a wider beam and a flatter floor profile than standard whitewater rafts, these boats offer exceptional stability for standing while casting. The FR series is built to accommodate heavy rowing frames, casting platforms, and large coolers. Constructed with Achilles' premium CSM fabric, these rafts are highly resistant to the abrasions and punctures common when navigating shallow, rocky riverbeds.
features: Wide Beam Design for maximum stability
Extra Stainless Steel D-Rings for gear and frame tie-downs
Large Tube Diameters for high payload capacity

construction.material: Achilles CSM Fabric / Expedition Grade Construction

variants.name: FR-130
variants.description: A nimble 13' fishing raft designed for technical rivers and technical rowing frames.

variants.name: FR-140
variants.description: The 14' expedition fishing platform, offering a large footprint for casting decks and multi-day gear.
